devdoc.details: This contract is intentionally simple for learning/demo purposes.

updateFundUsage(uint256,string).details: Only the bond creator can call this.

updateTrustScore(uint256).details: Simple formula for MVP:      - Base score: min(50, logsCount * 10)      - Bonus if updated early: +10 if first update within 7 days of creation      - Bonus for momentum: +2 per 10% funding progress (max +20)      - Max score capped at 100
